section_miscategorizations.text: Order hemoglobin A1c to monitor diabetes control.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The hemoglobin A1c result (8%) is already documented in the Objective section, so the order appears to refer to a test that has already been performed. As written, this blurs whether the A1c is a past result (O) or a new order (P). If it is truly a new order, it belongs in P; if it refers to the documented 8% value, it should be in O. The ambiguity creates a minor organizational issue but is not clearly misleading clinically.
